creator: sigsys@gmail.com
text:
There have been 3 minor revisions of the 0.E branch that fix some bugs:
https://cataclysmdda.org/releases/#0e-3-ellison-3

diff --git a/games/cataclysm-dda/Makefile b/games/cataclysm-dda/Makefile
index 642e90f4ee27..b5452a417dd0 100644
--- a/games/cataclysm-dda/Makefile
+++ b/games/cataclysm-dda/Makefile
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # Created by: Vladimir Kondratiev <wulf@cicgroup.ru>
 
 PORTNAME=	cataclysm-dda
-DISTVERSION=	0.E
+DISTVERSION=	0.E-3
 PORTREVISION?=	0
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	games
diff --git a/games/cataclysm-dda/distinfo b/games/cataclysm-dda/distinfo
index 38997e04a831..053c0d3d3e72 100644
--- a/games/cataclysm-dda/distinfo
+++ b/games/cataclysm-dda/distinfo
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 TIMESTAMP = 1588360415
-SHA256 (CleverRaven-Cataclysm-DDA-0.E_GH0.tar.gz) = b0af9a9292929e17332edcea770bca9a91f1d08ea47726d78a47e09281a42fa3
-SIZE (CleverRaven-Cataclysm-DDA-0.E_GH0.tar.gz) = 69933302
+SHA256 (CleverRaven-Cataclysm-DDA-0.E-3_GH0.tar.gz) = 21ac5226a996ac465842f188cadea8815eae7309fe38cf8d94de2f8ac97cd820
+SIZE (CleverRaven-Cataclysm-DDA-0.E-3_GH0.tar.gz) = 70144192
